subject: feat(ux): add 8 UX/UI improvements inspired by design editor analysis
body:
Toast notifications, inline confirmations, export progressive disclosure,
contextual quick-actions, hover previews, empty state guidance, zoom controls,
and keyboard shortcuts. Informed by patterns from Canva, Adobe Express, and
other major design editors — adapted to fit CanvaGrid's focused scope.

Tags: ui, ux, export, feedback, accessibility

Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
